text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the Arima Kinen has arrived, and the
stage is set for the ultimate sibling showdown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide can't even remember the last time
she and her sister raced each other. While
acknowledging Narita Brian's abilities, she
proclaims that she will win this climactic
confrontation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, she will be the one to triumph! The final
showdown with Narita Brian the Beast begins!
